briefs.title: BC Small Claims Court rules updated January 19, 2026 — CRT overlap provisions removed
briefs.summary: Starting January 19, 2026, BC's Small Claims Court rules are updated to remove overlapping procedures tied to the Civil Resolution Tribunal (an online dispute resolution body that handles smaller claims). Cases that began through the CRT will now be clearly identified under the updated rules.
briefs.action_required: If you have an active or upcoming Small Claims dispute in BC, confirm with the court or a legal advisor how the January 19 rule changes affect your case.

key_dates.label: BC Small Claims Rules amendments take effect — CRT overlap rules removed
